The products our portfolio include Microsoft Fabric, Azure SQL DB, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure PostgreSQL, Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, and Power BI. Our mission is to build the data platform for the age of AI, powering a new class of data\\-first applications and driving a data culture.

The platform provides a unified experience, unified governance, enables a unified business model and a unified architecture.

title: SDE-2, RBS Tech
description:
**Description**
 Retail Business Services (RBS) supports Amazon’s Retail business growth WW through three core tasks. These are (a) Selection, where RBS sources, creates and enrich ASINs to drive GMS growth; (b) Defect Elimination: where RBS resolves inbound supply chain defects and develops root cause fixes to improve free cash flow and (c) supports operational process for WW Retail teams where there is an air gap in the tech stack. The tech team in RBS develops automation that leverages Machine/Deep Learning to scale execution of these high complex tasks that currently require human cognitive skills. Our solutions ensure that information in Amazon's catalog is complete, correct and, comprehensive enough to give Amazon customers a great shopping experience every time. We are building solutions to move towards retail automation and are using latest technology like LLM to solve business problems.
   

  

 We believe in “Work Hard. Have Fun. Make History” value by having a strong focus on sharing learning experiences from the front line with the development teams. So, the options for people in the team are vast. If you like mastering a domain and going deep, we need you. If you can juggle three tasks and coordinate with multiple people in the heat of an incident, we need you. If you love the benefits of process and methodical improvement, you will love it here. If you want to keep your head down, headphones on, and bash out code to support the team, we have a spot for you too.
   

  

 At Amazon, we hire the best minds in technology to innovate and build on behalf of our customers. The focus we have on our customers is why we are one of the world’s most beloved brands – customer obsession is part of our company DNA.
   

  

 We are seeking a Software Development Engineer who can design and develop systems for its businesses. As an SDE, you would have immense opportunity to explore avenues of how to model things, figure out right abstraction level, take judgement calls around multiple design trade offs at hand that influence a multi billion dollar business.
   

  

 We are looking for highly talented software development engineers who are passionate not only about architecting and developing large scale distributed technology solutions but also innovating new ideas and providing directions to our business. You will get to work on some of the key initiatives planned to support our rapid evolution and growth of our businesses. In this process you will drive best practices, mentor other engineers, drive continuous improvements in engineering and operational excellence. You will use cutting\\-edge technology to solve complex problems and get to see the impact of their work first\\-hand. The challenges SDEs solve for at Amazon are big and influence millions of customers, sellers, and products around the world. As a SDE with RBS team, you will work with talented peers of SDEs and Applied scientists to build robust engineering platforms to solve high impact issues. You will constantly stretch the boundaries of innovation to tackle the business challenges.
   

  

 If you enjoy designing and building highly distributed systems that can scale and solving challenging problems, come to join us!
   

  

 Mentorship \\& Career Growth
   

  

 Our team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we’re building an environment that celebrates knowledge sharing and mentorship. Our senior members enjoy one\\-on\\-one mentoring, detailed and constructive code reviews. We have casual coffee chats with Principal \\& Senior Engineers from RBS tech. You get an opportunity to network and have technical conversations around your work, technical challenges, suggestions, ideas and proposals. You can also seek advice and discuss about things outside work, like, life in general, your family, hobbies etc. We provide trainings to the employees through online learning platforms such as O'reilly and also encourage them to take up AWS/ML certifications.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 We are looking for a sharp, experienced Software developer with a diverse skillset and background. As a SDE\\-2, your work is consistently of high quality. You solve difficult problems, applying appropriate technologies and best practices. You work with your team to invent, design and build software that is stable and performant. You are proficient in a broad range of design approaches and know when it is appropriate to use them (and when it is not). You limit the use of short\\-term workarounds. You create flexible software without over\\-engineering. You make appropriate trade\\-offs, re\\-use where possible, and are judicious about introducing dependencies. You are efficient with resource usage (e.g., system hardware, database, memory/CPU, etc.). You work on project ideas with customers, stakeholders, and peers. You help your team evolve by actively participating in the code review process, design discussions, team planning, and ticket/metric reviews. You focus on operational excellence, constructively identifying problems and proposing solutions. You take on projects and make software enhancements that improve team software and processes. You are able to train new team\\-mates on how your team’s software is constructed, how it operates, how secure it is, and how it fits into the bigger picture. You foster a constructive dialogue and seek resolutions in a professional way. You help recruit and interview for your team. You mentor and help to develop others.

* 2\\+ years of non\\-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience

title: Software Development Engineer Test, Backend
description:
**Overview Of The Company**
 Fox Corporation
   

  

 Under the FOX banner, we produce and distribute content through some of the world’s leading and most valued brands, including: FOX News Media, FOX Sports, FOX Entertainment, FOX Television Stations and Tubi Media Group. We empower a diverse range of creators to imagine and develop culturally significant content, while building an organization that thrives on creative ideas, operational expertise and strategic thinking.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Fox Corporation is home to industry\\-leading brands including FOX News Media, FOX Sports, FOX Entertainment, FOX Television Stations, Tubi Media Group, and FOX One , our recently launched direct\\-to\\-consumer (DTC) platform.
   

  

 Across our portfolio, we build and operate large\\-scale digital platforms that serve millions of users globally. Our teams combine innovative technology, deep data insights, and world\\-class content to deliver highly personalized, reliable, and scalable consumer experiences across web, mobile, and connected TV platforms.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As an SDET (Software Development Engineer in Test) working on backend systems for API, Personalization \\& Recommendations (PNR), or Search , you will own backend quality end\\-to\\-end across highly distributed, ML\\-powered systems.
   

  

 While this is a QA\\-focused role , it demands strong software engineering skills to build scalable automation, validation frameworks, and quality systems for complex backend and ML\\-powered platforms.
   

  

 This is not a manual QA role . The focus is on automation, systems thinking, and quality engineering at scale . You will define test strategies for complex service interactions, build and scale backend automation, and ensure release confidence for high\\-traffic, production\\-critical systems.
   

  

 You will work closely with Backend Engineers, Platform teams, Data Scientists, and ML Engineers to ensure correctness, reliability, and early detection of issues , well before they impact users.
   

  

 This role requires strong quality engineers who take end\\-to\\-end ownership of backend quality, can work independently with minimal guidance, and consistently uphold a high bar for correctness, reliability, and engineering rigor in test and automation.
   

  

**A SNAPSHOT OF YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES** 
**Backend Quality \\& Automation (Core)**
* Own backend quality end\\-to\\-end , including test strategy, automation, and release confidence.
* Design, build, and maintain robust automation frameworks for API, service, data, and workflow validation.
* Build scalable, reusable backend automation and regression suites , not one\\-off scripts.
* Validate synchronous and asynchronous flows across distributed microservices.
* Validate data persistence, caching behavior, and consistency across services.
* Perform service virtualization and dependency mocking where required.


**PNR, ML \\& AI Systems Validation**
* Validate personalization and recommendation workflows as backend capabilities.
* Verify correctness of inputs, outputs, and decisioning logic for ML\\-driven services.
* Validate model inference pipelines , including online and batch inference.
* Partner with Data Scientists and ML Engineers to understand expected behavior, metrics, and edge cases.
* Validate data quality, transformations, and feature correctness feeding downstream ML systems.
* Support validation of ML concepts such as features, training vs inference, evaluation metrics, drift, and bias.


**Search \\& Intelligent Discovery Validation**
* Validate advanced search systems , including semantic and vector\\-based search.
* Validate search relevance, ranking correctness, and query understanding pipelines.
* Validate systems supporting NER, intent detection, query classification, and query rewriting.
* Validate LLM\\-powered and conversational search experiences , including multi\\-turn and agentic flows.
* Perform scenario\\-based validation of search and recommendation decisioning logic.


**Performance, Reliability \\& CI/CD**
* Execute and support performance, scalability, and reliability testing for backend services.
* Build monitoring and validation pipelines that detect issues early and proactively .
* Integrate automation into CI/CD pipelines to ensure consistent quality gates.
* Partner with engineering teams to continuously improve testability, observability, and system resilience.


**WHAT YOU WILL NEED**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or a related technical field.
* 3–7 years of experience as an SDET or Automation Engineer with a strong backend focus.
* Strong software engineering and automation skills using Python or Java .
* Solid understanding of distributed systems, microservices, and event\\-driven architectures .
* Experience validating APIs, services, data pipelines, and complex backend workflows .
* Experience testing personalization, recommendation, or search platforms .
* Practical experience validating AI/ML\\-powered systems in production environments .
* Working knowledge of ML concepts, including features, training vs inference, evaluation metrics, drift, and bias.
* Experience validating data pipelines built on platforms such as Spark, Databricks, Kafka , or similar.
* Strong SQL skills for large\\-scale data validation.
* Experience with CI/CD systems and Git\\-based workflows.
* Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.
* Strong debugging, analytical, and communication skills.
* Ability to take ownership of backend quality and drive results with minimal guidance.


*We are an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories consistent with applicable law.*

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Location Name:** 
 Pune Corporate Office \\- Mantri
   

  

**Job Purpose**
 The Senior Software Engineer (Salesforce) role exists to drive the development, integration, administration, and support of our Salesforce Wheels org and associated applications. The position is vital for ensuring system reliability, enabling effective business processes for loan origination and underwriting, supporting multiple business teams, and delivering strategic technology projects to help Bajaj Finance achieve its business goals efficiently.
   

  

**Duties And Responsibilities**
 Key Responsibilities:
   

  

* Lead the design, development, customization, and integration of Salesforce CRM and allied business\\-critical applications, including loan origination and underwriting systems, to achieve desired functionality and efficiency for business operations.
* Ensure the stability, availability, and optimal performance of the Salesforce platform by proactively monitoring system health, troubleshooting issues, and minimizing potential business disruptions.
* Coordinate effectively with internal cross\\-functional teams and external partners to drive the timely completion of project milestones, oversee change management processes, and ensure all deliverables align with organizational standards.
* Provide advanced technical support (Tier 2 and Tier 3\\), handle incident management, and implement permanent resolutions for recurring issues to enhance the end\\-user experience.
* Maintain comprehensive and up\\-to\\-date documentation, including support processes, user guides, training materials, and knowledge base articles, to aid user enablement and knowledge transfer.
* Oversee and implement system integrations between Salesforce and other business\\-critical systems using industry\\-standard APIs (SOAP/REST), thus supporting data integrity and seamless process flows.
* Uphold governance by tracking delivery schedules, managing change processes, and providing regular status reports to relevant stakeholders.


**Key Decisions / Dimensions**
* Selection of appropriate technical approaches and programming methodologies (including choice of Java/Apex patterns, integration strategies, and API usage) for developing and enhancing Salesforce and related business applications.
* Prioritization and scheduling of development tasks, support activities, and incident resolution to ensure alignment with project timelines and business priorities.
* Evaluation and implementation of integration techniques to connect Salesforce with other platforms (e.g., Portals, EDW, mobile applications) while ensuring data consistency and system reliability.
* Identification and application of best practices for change management, version control, and deployment within the Salesforce ecosystem, in alignment with DevOps and ITIL principles.
* Determination of root cause solutions for recurring system issues, including whether to implement temporary workarounds or permanent fixes, while balancing risk and impact.
* Decisions regarding escalation or resolution of complex incidents and service requests, including coordination with cross\\-functional teams and external partners as appropriate.
* Selection and preparation of documentation, training materials, and user guides to maximize knowledge transfer and facilitate user adoption.
* Assessment of technological advancements and recommendations for adoption of relevant new tools, frameworks, or practices to support ongoing platform improvements.


**Major Challenges**
* Ensuring seamless integration of Salesforce CRM with diverse external and internal systems (such as portals, enterprise data warehouses, and mobile applications) while maintaining data integrity and system performance.
* Managing platform enhancements and multiple ongoing projects simultaneously, including the definition, execution, and timely delivery of project milestones within stringent deadlines.
* Addressing complex technical issues and resolving recurring incidents quickly to minimize downtime and maintain business continuity in a fast\\-paced financial services environment.
* Balancing the need for rapid delivery of new features and enhancements with stringent quality standards and regulatory compliance requirements.
* Coordinating effectively with cross\\-functional teams and external partners to align IT initiatives with evolving business requirements, while managing stakeholder expectations.
* Maintaining comprehensive documentation and knowledge bases despite frequent changes and updates in business processes and technology.
* Adapting to advancements in Salesforce technology, system integrations, and DevOps practices, and ensuring continuous skill development for sustained platform excellence.


**Required Qualifications And Experience**
* Qualifications


 Bachelor's / master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field. Experience in Manual and Automation Testing.
   

  

* Work Experience


 3\\+ years of experience in a Salesforce Admin/Developer role within a technology or IT organization.
   

  

 Skills and Knowledge
   

  

* Strong proficiency in Java and Apex programming languages, with hands\\-on experience in object\\-oriented programming and development on the Salesforce platform.
* In\\-depth understanding of Salesforce architecture, including configuration, customization, workflows, and security models.
* Practical experience with Salesforce APIs (SOAP/RESTful) for system integrations with internal and external platforms such as portals, data warehouses, and mobile applications.
* Demonstrated capability in project management: defining milestones, managing delivery schedules, monitoring progress, and facilitating status reporting.
* Proficient in Salesforce administration, platform health monitoring, incident management, and providing Tier 2 and Tier 3 technical support.
* Strong analytical and diagnostic skills for troubleshooting system issues, performing root cause analysis, and implementing permanent resolutions.
* Ability to document technical solutions, support processes, and create training materials and user guides for varied stakeholders.
* Sound understanding of the loan business lifecycle, financial processes, and the operational requirements of a financial services organization. (Good to have)
* Basic knowledge of database systems and data management principles.
* Familiarity with ITIL processes and frameworks for change management, service delivery, and IT governance.
* Exposure to DevOps practices related to Salesforce, including automated deployments, version control, and continuous integration.
* Experience collaborating with cross\\-functional teams (e.g., IT, Sales, Marketing) and managing relationships with external technology partners.

description:

 As a senior technical authority, I deliver value that materially changes outcomes for the company, and my job is not just about my technical judgement but also my ability to influence others to deliver results. I am an authority on multiple technologies and in multiple domains; senior engineers from other teams come to me for advice on the architecture of their products. I am a proponent of an effective engineering community that encourages learning for all.
   

 I guide large complex programmes of work, working with and influencing the engineering, product, programme, and business teams. I make the right trade\\-offs to influence the roadmap and sequencing of work to deliver early and often. I am hands on with design and coding to resolve hard problems that have a long\\-term impact.
   

 I guide one or more areas and define the strategic design keeping security, scalability, extensibility, and reusability in mind. I drive Tesco’s Inner Source Platform, maintaining and contributing to projects whilst influencing direction and adoption. I have strong communication and influencing skills to resolve disputes and to lead stakeholders to appropriate decisions with data points and foresight. I have sufficient breadth and depth of technical knowledge to influence senior leaders on engineering strategy. I build strategy documents, designs and code which are exemplary and serve as a model for others. I write
   

 critical path code, having a good appreciation of the whole stack. I innovate and stay ahead of industry trends, competition, and new paradigms and share appropriately. I routinely come up with PoCs to evaluate approaches or technology choices to enable or accelerate programmes.

**People, budgets and other resources I am accountable
   

 for in my job:**

 Development Practise Infrastructure Software Security Operations and Maintenance Core Technology Development Lifecycle Product Methodologies Retail Technology Awareness Communication \\& InfluencingData Analytics \\& Insights Strategic Thinking \\& Problem Solving Finance \\& Procurement Curiosity \\& Learning Embracing and Enabling Change    
   

**Experience relevant for this job:** 
**S** 
 uccessfully had across large engineering organisations.Demonstrated experience designing, developing and running whole system landscapes.Experience acting as a technical authority across multiple domains and multiple technologiesExperience proposing architectural patterns for adoption by an organisation.Experience guiding large programmes of work.Experience driving the adoption of inner sourcing initiatives.
   

**Whats in it for you?**
  

 At Tesco, we are committed to providing the best for you. 
   

  
   

 As a result, our colleagues enjoy a unique, differentiated, market\\- competitive reward package, based on the current industry practices, for all the work they put into serving our customers, communities and planet a little better every day. 
   

  
   

 Our Tesco Rewards framework consists of pillars \\- Fixed Pay, Incentives, and Benefits.  
   

  
   

 Total Rewards offered at Tesco is determined by four principles \\-simple, fair, competitive, and sustainable. 
   

  
   

**Salary**

**Leave \\& Time\\-off**

**Health is Wealth**

With cross\\-functional expertise, a wide network of teams, and strong governance, we reduce complexity, thereby offering high\\-quality services for our customers.

title: Power BI
description:
We are seeking a senior BI Developer based in India to help support and play a critical role in rebuilding and scaling our semantic models, existing and new dashboards, and reporting layer. This role will work hand\\-in\\-hand with our Senior Data Engineer (India based), and US based data leaders to redesign existing analytics into a more performant, maintainable, and scalable solution.
 



 PBI Senior Developer – Skill Set \\& Responsibilities
 


1. Semantic Model Analysis \\& Optimization



 Lead the
 **redesign and optimization of Power BI semantic models** 
 , including relationships, measures, calculation logic, and overall structure
 


* Identify performance bottlenecks and data modeling issues
* Reduce existing technical debt by simplifying models, improving star schema, optimizing DAX
* Partner with data engineers to shape curated, analytics\\-ready tables in Microsoft Fabric
* Ensure adherence to best practices (naming standards, reusable measures, clean modeling)


1. Report Review \\& Enhancement


* Review existing reports and dashboards and provide recommendations for usability, clarity, and performance
* Redesign visuals and interactions (navigation, drill\\-through) for improved storytelling and business impact while aligning with updated models and standard
* Support migration from legacy reports to standardized PowerBI solutions


1. New Report Development


* Design and develop new Power BI reports by translating business requirements into clear, intuitive, and performant visualizations
* Build scalable data models and advanced DAX measures to support reporting needs


1. Technical Collaboration with Data Engineering


* Partner closely with US and India data engineers to validate data structures, transformations, and metric logic
* Use SQL and PySpark to understand and validate upstream data
* Provide feedback on data structures from a BI performance and usability perspective


1. Performance, Reliability and Maintenance


* Optimize dataset refresh times and memory usage
* Support monitoring and triage of PowerBI refresh failures
* Troubleshoot DAX, model, and performance issues
* Support reliable daily, weekly, and monthly reporting operations


1. Governance \\& Best Practices


* Help create established standards for DAX development, naming conventions, dataset structure, visualization templates
* Maintain documentation of semantic models, datasets, measures, and calculation logic
* Support QA testing and validation of changes prior to production release
* Assist in mentoring and developing junior BI developers / analysts on technical best practices and comfort with PowerBI



**Qualifications** 



* 6–10\\+ years of experience in Business Intelligence / BI Development roles
* Expert\\-level Power BI skills, including semantic models, complex DAX, and dataset optimization
* Strong SQL skills and experience with structured data models
* Working knowledge of PySpark and Microsoft Fabric sufficient to collaborate with data engineers
* Experience refactoring and maintaining existing BI environments
* Strong attention to detail and quality
* Ability to work effectively within a globally distributed team
* Experience supporting ERP\\-driven analytics (Dynamics 365 preferred).
* Preferred experience in wholesale, retail, consumer goods, or supply\\-chain\\-heavy environments
* Familiarity with data governance, metric standardization, and analytics QA processes
